headline: CrowdStrike Accelerates Agentic MDR with NVIDIA, Demonstrating 5x Faster Investigations and 3x Higher Triage Accuracy
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026--GTC – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to advance Agentic Managed Detection and Response (MDR) using the NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, featuring open NVIDIA Nemotron models and NVIDIA NeMo Data Designer to power specialized security agents and speed investigative workflows.

raw.headline: CrowdStrike Accelerates Agentic MDR with NVIDIA, Demonstrating 5x Faster Investigations and 3x Higher Triage Accuracy
raw.summary: AUSTIN, Texas & SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026--GTC – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to advance Agentic Managed Detection and Response (MDR) using the NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, featuring open NVIDIA Nemotron models and NVIDIA NeMo Data Designer to power specialized security agents and speed investigative workflows.

headline: CrowdStrike Unveils Secure-by-Design AI Blueprint for AI Agents Built with NVIDIA
summary: AUSTIN, Texas & SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026--GTC – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today unveiled a Secure-by-Design AI Blueprint built with NVIDIA that integrates protection from the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform directly into NVIDIA OpenShell, an open-source runtime that enforces policy-based guardrails to make autonomous agents safer to deploy.

raw.headline: CrowdStrike Unveils Secure-by-Design AI Blueprint for AI Agents Built with NVIDIA
raw.summary: AUSTIN, Texas & SAN JOSE, Calif., March 16, 2026--GTC – CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today unveiled a Secure-by-Design AI Blueprint built with NVIDIA that integrates protection from the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform directly into NVIDIA OpenShell, an open-source runtime that enforces policy-based guardrails to make autonomous agents safer to deploy.

headline: NVIDIA Ignites the Next Industrial Revolution in Knowledge Work With Open Agent Development Platform
summary: NVIDIA Agent Toolkit Equips Enterprises to Build and Run AI Agents NVIDIA Agent Toolkit NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and NVIDIA OpenShell open source runtime ignite the next era of AI with open source software for autonomous, self-evolving enterprise AI agents to speed a generational shift in software and knowledge work.
